name: Via with correct odd-only layer indices
description: Tests that the agent uses only odd-numbered layers for SignalLayer and GroundLayer, and sets up SignalTable with matching via numbers
prompt: Set up a signal via that connects layer 1 to layer 7 through a 6-layer PCB with ground planes on layers 3 and 5. Use FR4 substrate and compute S-parameters from 1 to 20 GHz.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
SignalTable viaNum=1 matches the single signal via

name: Ground return via placement with SI analysis
description: Tests that the agent places GRVs and uses criticalwavelength or gapratedistance for signal integrity evaluation
prompt: I have a signal via at the origin going from layer 1 to layer 9 in a 10-layer board. Place 4 ground return vias around it and check if the GRV placement is adequate for 28 GHz signaling.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses criticalwavelength or gapratedistance for SI check at 28 GHz
Does not attempt mesh() or getZ0() on viaSingleEnded (behavioral model only)

name: Per-layer pad customization
description: Tests that the agent uses getpads() to customize individual layer pads rather than setting a single radius for all layers
prompt: I need a via with a larger pad on layer 3 (0.45mm radius) than the other layers (0.3mm radius). Set it up on a 6-layer board.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Retrieves or constructs per-layer pad array (via getpads or manual cell array of Circle shapes)
assertions.expected: getpads() call or manual construction of cell array with per-layer pad shapes

assertions.description: Modifies specific layer pad then assigns to SignalViaPad
assertions.expected: SignalViaPad assignment with per-layer differentiation (layer 3 larger)
